title: Detailed List Of diffrences In 101 and Episodes 1 6
display_title: Detailed List Of diffrences In 101 and Episodes 1 6
wikitext:
[]: Detailed List Of diffrences In 1.01 and Episodes 1-6             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 23, 2009 1:34 pm I kinda had to do this for an English Analysis Essay, had to compare two films and figured what the heck ill do it one Evangelion. Well i didn't notice most of this until i compared the two section by section Using the 1.01 American Dubbed DVD and the Platinum Collection that iv had for a while. If you see anything major i missed feel free to point it out and ill add them, and feel free to discuss. Im also doing a in detail explanation of the story of the series from the technical, Judeo-christian, and psychology perspectives explaining all the little details and plots within the series by episode and interconnecting, im only to episode ten and its already 19 pages and going in 12 point font single spacing so you guys have that to look forward too. I warn with collage and all it may take some time to finish so i wouldn't expect it anytime soon, maybe next month at the earliest and that will be a complete miracle. Differences List 1. The opening of the of both are completely different Neon Genesis Evangelion opens with a date and location and a helicopter view of the shadow of the 3rd Angel Sachiel moving through the now sunken section of Neo Tokyo 3, while 1.01 skips this scene and jumps to the scene of a line of tanks waiting for the Incoming Angel Sachiel. 2. The water throughout the series is the normal colors accept for around the Antarctic where it is red and uninhabitable, while in 1.01 the water is red almost everywhere but a few select places. 3. In 1.01 the outline of some large being surrounded by blood stained earth and destroyed buildings inside a section of Japan, not explained. 4. Emergency message is showed being aired through Japan, while this is left unmentioned in 1.01. 5. Misato is first shown looking for Shinji in the series, while Shinji is first shown looking for Misato in 1.01 6. Many lines are re-organized but ultimately say the same thing 7. Many frames are re-organized but show the same thing 8. Many more Nerve military craft in 1.01 9. In the series it is revealed earlier that Nerve is watching the angel approach and that it’s been 15 years since the last one appeared while in 1.01 it isn’t explained till much later. 10. They add a lot of flashy details in 1.01 due to the much larger budget 11. Lots of art has been improved in environments and character alike 12. Large scene of character development removed, the trip to a Nerve Access point of Shinji in Misato’s destroyed car removed, and they are shown simply on a car train going into the Geofront. 13. Misato doesn’t get lost inside of Nerve HQ in 1.01 14. Lots of little bits of character development and information on things skipped in 1.01 15. Scene of Shinji, Misato, and Risuko on elevator going up to unit one skipped completely, skips explaining that unit one never functioned and was considerd the 09 system in 1.01. 16. First scene within Eva Unit Ones cage had a lot of dialogue cut and re-organized 17. Foreshadowing event of Eva unit one ripping its arm out of the restraint to protect Shinji from the series removed 1.01. 18. 1.01 shows the entire Satchiel battle with Eva Unit One sequence before showing Shinji in the hospital, and the armor never falls off the eva’s head revealing what is underneath. 19. Death of angels now lead to massive amounts of blood and material launched in the air and now often causes rainbows upon their death. 20. Scene where Rei's name is explained from later in the series is placed within the first film in place of the eva loosing its cranial armor in 1.01 21. New body of blood left behind in the angels wake in 1.01 rather then the simple destruction in the series scene is completely different 22. Seele obelisks from late in the animated series are used from beginning to end of the 1.01 film. 23. Same things happen generally after first angel attack but everything is organized completely different. 24. Product placements added while in grocery store and Misato's home 25. Most of episode 3 is skipped completely other then the following in 1.01: a. Simulation body training where Shinji is explained as getting through life by simply doing what he is told. b. Toji Suzahara beating Shinji for leading to his sister getting injured c. Hedgehogs’ dilemma scene still their but completely re-organized beyond similarity except for a few seconds d. Rei can still sense the angels approach e. Shamshiel is still the Angel and looks about the same, and the battle still plays out the same with minor changes and the body is destroyed unlike in the series. 26. All of episode 4 is skipped and cut other then the following in 1.01: c. Hedgehogs’ dilemma scene still their but completely re-organized beyond similarity except for a few seconds a. Shinji’s scolding for going against orders during the previous fight with Shamshel b. Shinji riding the loop train until it stops cycling, his walk through the red-light district, and ultimately his night spent in a cardboard box in a small alley rather than the bust stop bench as in the series. c. He still ends up in the plateaus, but doesn’t spend the night with Kensuke, and skips straight to him getting caught walking down a road that had been destroyed by something. d. It is revealed that the entire time Nerve agents had been following him the entire time and he had known it for at least a while, this is slightly different but same result. e. He gets scorned again by Misato. f. Rei and Shinji are emphasized to have much bigger roles this time and it seems that Gendo and Fuyutski are planning events to control Shinji and Rei’s actions to follow Gendo’s or Seele’s plans. g. Toji letting Shinji get even with him for beating him up by letting Shinji punch him back. This however takes place at school rather than the train station. h. Shinji doesn’t however begin to leave Tokyo 3, he stays after being scorned. 27. All of episode 5 is skipped other then the following in 1.01 a. Scene of the Male gym class gawking at the Girls gym class, where Shinji is revealed to have interest in Rei, mainly about how she always seems to be alone. b. It is explained during a unseen conversation between Ritsuko and Shinji that Gendo saved Rei. This leads into for the first time the Eva unit 00 activation test accident. c. Shinji watching Rei and his father get along during tests d. Bar scene with Misato and Ritsuko added replacing the scene that was their where Shinji and the two had dinner together at Misato’s apartment and Shinji was given Rei’s ID card to deliver, which still is arranged in this scene. e. Rei Apartment Scene still intact, identical to series in 1.01 f. Rei and Shinji going to Nerve afterward is identical g. 5th angel Ramiel first attack on eva unit one is the same except for cosmetic improvements and minor redirection in cerography. Shinji is shown to be more tortured as well as Nerve staff as in what to do. 28. All of episode 6 is replaced and redone except for the following in 1.01 a. Ramiel still drills into the geofront but the drill forms from its body rather than being part of it. b. Meeting on how to handle Operation Yushima the situation still takes place but is animated completely different. c. All of the preplanning is animated completely different due to the new and improved budget except for. 1. Shinji being visited and informed in the hospital room by Rei Nothing from this point on is the same and is improved and redone until the scene where Shinji does the same act as his father and rushes to Rei’s side to make sure she is ok after the battle, and reminds her of his father. The scene is the same except for some improved animation. Lilith is seemingly no longer secret, and is spoken of as if Gendo and Fuyutsuki have had contact with it at some point in the past. Its mask is also changed to be similar to that of Satchels which is modeled after part of an ancient symbol for the devil shown in the opening of the series, a large number of angels had this sort of face originally. 29. New Scene at the very end for a few minutes introducing Kawaru Nagisa who was not in the show until the final episodes and was an angel. \\ There ya go that took quite a while until the end when episode 6 starts kicking in, it was by far the furthest the entire movie swayed from the series i just gave up at that point it was getting so hard to compare them.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Mon Nov 23, 2009 1:36 pm Evageeks did one too! http://wiki.evageeks.org/Differences_between_Rebuild_of_Evangelion_1.0_and_Original_Series

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 23, 2009 1:44 pm well dam lol i feel like i just did the same thing they did however mention something i didn't catch somehow and i mentioned more specific detail generally then they did so take it as you will. O well.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Nov 23, 2009 2:05 pm Hedgehogs’ dilemma scene still their but completely re-organized beyond similarity except for a few seconds

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 23, 2009 2:50 pm thanks for pointing that out somehow didnt catch that even tho i know most of the episode names after watching it all these years. I think it was actually a little early in the film but it makes sense that it should be listed under episode 4.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Nov 23, 2009 3:20 pm Still can't believe there is no "after battle" scene where 01's head platting comes off.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 23, 2009 3:52 pm Yeah i find it rather odd that they removed the Eva cranial plating falling off sense that early drives the idea that "Hey, im not a giant typical robot, AND STOP STICKING WHITE TUBES FILLED WITH EMOTIONALLY DAMAGED CHILDREN IN MY SPINAL CORD YA JERKS"

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Sat Nov 28, 2009 1:35 am So i was right, now i don't feel as stupid lol o well ill correct it, but im glad you liked my remark firegirl, had to be said since Gendo a jerk, and sticks a dummy plug in unit one over and over and it gets rejected in episode 16 even tho its stated that its actually Yui rejecting it and not the eva, sort of like Yui was irked by Gendo's personality flaws and response to Shinji and and said simply no after all that had happened in ep 15.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Nov 28, 2009 8:58 am Kamina wrote: So i was right, now i don't feel as stupid lol o well ill correct it, but im glad you liked my remark firegirl, had to be said since Gendo a jerk, and sticks a dummy plug in unit one over and over and it gets rejected in episode 16 even tho its stated that its actually Yui rejecting it and not the eva, sort of like Yui was irked by Gendo's personality flaws and response to Shinji and and said simply no after all that had happened in ep 15.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Nov 30, 2009 5:29 am Lol sorry i do that ill refrain, i was in a hurry a bit that day lol.

[]:             Quote Post by alabaster » Mon Nov 30, 2009 7:03 pm When Misato scolds Shinji in the film, he has a drink, while he doesn't have one in the series. Also, in the film, he gives a very distinct(almost nasty) smirk (sort of uncharacteristic for Shinji) while in the series he kind of sighs a lot and just says, 'yes' to everything Misato says with the hint of a smirk. His smirk in the film really stood out to me.
